sections.paragraph:
verb לגדור

to fence, enclose; close a gap; restrain

verb להיגדר

be fenced in; restrained; defined

verb לגדר

to fence in, enclose

verb גודר

be fenced in, enclosed; blocked

verb להתגדר

be distinguished; to boast; to disagree

verb להגדיר

to define, classify, determine

verb הוגדר

be defined, classified, determined

verb לגדר (>>גידר)

to fence in, enclose

feminine noun

fence, railing, stockade, palisade
